text: It is quiet and dim here, the geometry of the room and the stark reflections from glass embodying a sense of emptiness. The darkness feels heavy, pushing me to contemplate solitude. There is an unease in this silence, as if I am wandering after-hours in a space made for collaboration but left with only my own thoughts for company. Yet, I sense a strange comfort in being unseen and uninterrupted amid the potential of 'R + D'—research and development—a promise of creation from this void.
